name: California Shrimp Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook shrimp in boiling water until done. Drain immediately.
2. Peel and devein the shrimp.
3. Chop half of the shrimp into small pieces and set aside.
4. Place the remaining whole shrimp in a bowl and squeeze lemon juice over them. Toss to coat.
5. Cover bowl and refrigerate in a cool place.
6. Combine gelatin, water, and lemon juice in a saucepan. Stir over low heat until gelatin is dissolved. Remove from heat.
7. Beat together cream cheese, sugar, parsley, lemon rind, salt, and pepper in a large bowl. If cream cheese is firm, soften it at room temperature first.
8. Blend the gelatin mixture into the cream cheese mixture and fold in the chopped shrimp by hand.
9. Pour the mixture into a 6 1/2 inch ring mold and refrigerate until firm.
10. To serve: Layer lettuce on a serving plate. Unmold the salad onto the lettuce. Combine plum preserves and Pickapeppa sauce, then drizzle over the mold.
11. Garnish with lemon slices and parsley sprigs. Fill the center of the mold with whole shrimp before serving.
